caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. Behind him are framed photographs on the wall, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt, and racks of clothing. A professional black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. He is speaking, with his mouth open in some frames and slightly closed in others, showing a subtle change in expression as he talks. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that reads "RED VELVET TOT." The background and equipment remain static while the man's facial movements indicate he is in the middle of a conversation or recording.
